fic.title: Doll God
fic.summary:
When Katsuki accidentally defaces a shrine to Deku, he scrambles to make things right before the god closes in on him.

***

“Kiss me, Kacchan. Not my vessel. Me.”

Katsuki’s breaths are stilted, shaky. He arches up and presses his lips against Izuku’s forehead.

His skin is warm. Soft. Almost… human.

Almost. 

Katsuki steps back, catching himself a moment before he stumbles. He can’t show any weakness.

Izuku gives him a shy little smile. “Not there.”

Katsuki swallows thickly, trying to push his heart down from where it’s taken residence in his throat. His instincts, normally sharp as his sword, swim through his muddied mind. “I… You want me to…”

When Izuku bites his lower lip, the action looks vulnerable. Inviting. “On the lips."

The words spill out of Katsuki’s lips against his will. “I’m in love with Izuku Midoriya.”

The Judge drops his hair. “What?”

He looks baffled. Katsuki would think it was funny if he wasn’t on the verge of breathing fire.

“Are you fucking serious?” The Judge’s cool demeanor drops instantly as he starts laughing. “The fucking - the hero? Deku?”

A growl starts in the back of Katsuki’s throat. Just his luck that the one time he’s forced to be honest about his feelings, this guy thinks it's a fucking joke. Jesus Christ. Katsuki’s life is a joke.

The Judge bends over, fully laughing now. “Oh my god, this is - wow. I don’t know what I was expecting but it wasn’t this. Dynamight, you just made this so much more interesting. I can do so much with this.”

The Judge gestures at the guard waiting at the only exit in the room. “You know what to do. Go grab him for me.”

fic.title: a gentle sort of horror
fic.summary:
“The ember?...”

Izuku paused his muttering.

At the door, basked in the moonlight coming from the window, there was a boy.

A boy wearing black-orange hero uniform ripped on his torso and on his arms. His face was almost irrecognizable, deep wounds marking the left side. His right arm was twisted in an impossible angle, hanging awkwardly with bones visible in a few places. Crimson blood was dripping to the floor from his stomach in small droplets. Izuku gasped. There was a hole in his chest. His… his heart was peeking through it.

Are human hearts always this pretty? There was one more thing amiss about that heart. It was not beating. The silence of the heart was almost overwhelming accompanied by the tangible dribbling of a bleeding wound.

“Ka-...”

Katsuki died a week ago on the battlefield. So who was standing there at his hospital room’s door?

fic.title: Love You, Baby!
fic.summary:
Izuku opened the door, ready to give whoever was furiously knocking stern talking to. His eyes went wide. “Whacchan?!”
“Izuku!” Katsuki said, looking more disheveled than Izuku had ever seen him, “I fucked up!”
“What? Kacchan, what—”
His next words were cut off by the loud wailing of a baby.
The two of them froze.
Izuku slowly looked into the hallway and saw a chubby, very angry looking baby in a bright pink stroller.
“Oh,” Izuku said.
The baby screamed in response.
---
Or: Katsuki somehow acquires a quirk baby.

fic.title: More Than Anything, I Love You
fic.summary:
The idea of a marriage proposal for Izuku’s 25th birthday was just meant to be a joking idea from Mina. Just a silly option to help Katsuki figure out a present that could possibly top the gift of a billion yen super suit the year prior.

Katsuki can never joke in regards to Izuku, though. So he’s spent the last month running around to make sure this proposal goes off without a hitch. It’s only inevitable that Izuku would see through his thinly veiled excuses of late night missions and errands for the Commission.

Izuku handles the fact that Katsuki is hiding something from him just about as well as one could expect– level headed and not jumping to any horrible conclusions.

Yeah, right.

fic.title: That Lavender Haze
fic.summary:
“I know your birthday is really soon and I wanted to give you a gift.”

“Oh,” The amusement in his voice was evident as he continued to check out the petite omega in front of him. “And what did you have in mind? For my gift, I mean.”

A soft blush graces the other’s cheeks. The skirt of the middle school uniform shifts as the milky thighs rub together. It was a subtle motion, but Izuku noticed it quickly.

“I haven’t presented yet, I’m a late bloomer, and you’ve been my favorite hero for a while.” The blonde whispered, not wanting the others standing in line or for his sire, who’s off to the side, to hear. “I want you to be my first, make me present.”

——

 

A.K.A Pro Hero Midoriya Izuku gets the best present from his 14-year-old biggest fan.

fic.title: Rooted In Red
fic.summary: Deep within Izuku's silent heart, the Hanahaki Disease took root at age nine, weaving a garden of crimson camellias born from an unspoken love for his brother. Years of hidden agony, where each flower was a fragment of soul and every cough a truth on the brink of eruption, culminate beneath the uncertain lights of a movie theater. There, the lethal beauty of his petals spills forth, revealing the secret to a Katsuki who navigates between fury and a devastating comprehension. At the crossroads of their worlds, the promise of "together" rises like a fragile yet resilient, immaculate camellia, sowing hope on an uncertain path, where love and pain, at last, dare to bloom.

fic.title: returning the favor
fic.summary:
“It’s fine if you wanna acknowledge it, nerd. Just don’t do anything overboard, okay?"

Despite his fever, just being around Kacchan is enough to recharge him a bit. Izuku loves him like nothing else. Maybe he wasn’t able to spoil Kacchan for his birthday the way he wanted to, but at least he learned something new and important about Kacchan, and now he feels that much closer to his boyfriend. They’ll make this work; there’s plenty of other ways Izuku can show Kacchan how much he loves him.
